image_prompt: Infographic checklist layout. Bold headline top: 'GOT THE SCHEDULE. NOW WHAT?' with arrow icon. Left side: illustrated professional woman in blazer seated at desk, laptop open showing federal contracts database, confident expression. Right side: 5 checklist rows, each with a green checkmark and a short 2-3 word label — 'SAM ALERTS', 'SOURCES SOUGHT', 'USASPENDING', 'FORECASTS', 'CO OUTREACH'. Bottom: dark navy banner with bold white text 'APPROVED ≠ DONE'. Footer text: 'Josh Ladick · GSA Focus'.
